x402 v2 402 response
payTo from SOLANA_ADDRESS env

WWW-Authenticate: Payment via mppx
methods from TREASURY_TEMPO and/or STRIPE_*

/audit route
content-negotiated HTML / JSON / Markdown
RL_DEMO rate limit + SESSION KV cache

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Static Assets (env.ASSETS)
/agents.txt /agents.json
/llms.txt /llms-full.txt /robots.txt /sitemap.xml
/.well-known/agent-card.json
/.well-known/api-catalog (RFC 9727)
/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json (SEP-2127)
/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json (agentskills.io v0.2.0)
/.well-known/security.txt (RFC 9116)
/openapi.json (Payment Discovery)
public/_headers (§4.5 CORS + MIME)

routes/oauth.ts (§11.2)
POST /oauth/token (client-credentials)
POST /oauth/introspect (RFC 7662)
GET /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server
GET /.well-known/openid-configuration (alias)
GET /.well-known/jwks.json
